response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year bar, with current role at re:cinq directly involving TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a strong match for the AI agent development requirement. Solid background across React, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and TDD/CI practices. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and PostgreSQL experience, but the underlying fundamentals and adjacent stack experience suggest quick ramp-up.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience at current role
Strong full-stack depth: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Demonstrated engineering rigor — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java recent experience listed
Heavy DLang focus in several roles — niche relative to the target stack
PostgreSQL/relational DB experience not clearly evidenced (mostly MongoDB/MySQL)

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of full-stack experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stack
